transcript: Speaker A: माझ्या मॅनेजरला माहित नाही की मी गेल्या दोन महिन्यांपासून English practice करत आहे. आणि तिला वाटतं माझं English पुरेसं चांगलं नाही. आज मी तिला surprise देणार आहे. [My manager doesn't know that I have been practicing English for the last two months. And she thinks my English is not good enough. Today I am going to surprise her.] Speaker A: I completely understand. I'm so sorry for the inconvenience. I'll have that sorted for you right away. Speaker B: Wow हे खूप professional English होतं. हे कुठून शिकलीस? [Wow, that was very professional English. Where did you learn this from?] Speaker A: मी गेल्या दोन महिन्यांपासून रोज फोनवर MySivi वर practice करत होते. जसं तुमच्या खिशातच एक English teacher असतो तसं. हे बघा, मी तुम्हाला दाखवते. [I have been practicing on MySivi on my phone every day for the last two months. Just like having an English teacher in your pocket. Look, let me show you.] Speaker C: तुझं नाव काय आहे? [What is your name?] Speaker A: I name is Shruti. Speaker C: I name is Shruti? नाही, My name is Shruti. [I name is Shruti? No, My name is Shruti.] Speaker C: तू कुठे राहतेस? [Where do you live?] Speaker A: I am Mumbai. Speaker C: "I am Mumbai." नाही, "I live in Mumbai." ["I am Mumbai." No, "I live in Mumbai."] Speaker A: मी नेहमी इथेच गोंधळ करते. [I always get confused here.] Speaker C: आणि म्हणूनच मी इथे आहे, तुला योग्य English बोलायला मदत करायला. [And that's why I am here, to help you speak correct English.] Speaker A: पण हे महाग असेल ना? [But this must be expensive, right?] Speaker C: अजिबात नाही. normal English classes पेक्षा 7 पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून 1 कोटी लोक MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker A: पण वेळ मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: रोज फक्त 10-15 मिनिटांची practice पुरेशी आहे. अगदी confident व्हाल. [Just 10-15 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will become very confident.] Speaker A: wow कसं join करू? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker C: हा install चा बटन दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. Sign up करा आणि practice start करा. फक्त 15 दिवसात तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. चला, सुरू करा. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, let's start.]

summary: A hotel trainee impresses her manager with fluent English, attributing her progress to daily practice on the MySivi app. She demonstrates how the app's AI avatar corrects her grammar in real-time. The ad highlights the app's affordability and convenience, urging users to download it for quick results.
